title: Aurora, 33887, Palm Pals Crisp Red Apple, 5In, Soft Toy, Red
features: Let's meet the Palm Pals Crisp Red Apple Soft Toy, the latest addition to Aurora's popular Palm Pals Collection. This adorable red apple plush is filled with beans. It fits perfectly into your palm, making it great for small cuddling. A wonderful gift for any occasion!

The Crisp Red is part of the Palm Pals Craving collection. The Palm Pals range includes collections such as Barn, Pets, Critters, Zoo, Aquatic, and many more. These plushies are all super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Palm Pals are cute, touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. They are part of our Eco-Friendly initiative, featuring inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic. Our hangtags are recyclable, and our cloth labels are made from recycled materials.

Suitable from birth, the Palm Pals Crisp Red Apple measures 13cm. Crisp keeps up with all the latest trends. Being an influencer is no joke to this pal! Crisp spends any extra time learning editing tricks, so any new content really makes a statement. Crisp also tries to promote every Palm Pal in their own special way, so they too can have their moment. This fresh influencer will surely win everyone's hearts!

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful plush and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
description: Product Description Say hello to the Palm Pals Crisp Red Apple Soft Toy, the latest addition to Aurora's popular Palm Pals Collection. This adorable red apple plush is filled with beans.
